case: Should a 50-person company adopt Notion as its primary workspace?
rationale: Strong all-in-one fit for documentation, lightweight projects, and team knowledge.
The rollout is faster than a heavily administered enterprise suite.
Governance, export testing, and AI data controls require explicit ownership.
conditions: Run a 30-day pilot with two representative teams.
Test workspace export and recovery before migration.
Approve data residency and AI processing terms with legal.
dissent: Confluence remains the stronger choice when mature permissions, auditability, and Jira-native governance outweigh usability.
